narrative:
Waldo Twp. township has 808 registered voters, with 48.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.0 percentage points.
